message:
fix(runtime): Guard against division by near-zero in rgb_to_hls

When lightness approaches 1.0 (near-white colors), the denominator
(2.0 - sumc) approaches zero, causing division by near-zero and
producing infinity for saturation.

Added epsilon guard (1e-14) to return s=1.0 in this edge case.
Fixes test_hls_nearwhite which uses 0.9999999999999999 as input.

References: CPython gh-106498
